title: Harbinger (disambiguation)
content:
'''Harbinger''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Harbinger (Imperial I-class)|Harbinger]]''''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] used by the [[Galactic Empire]] after the [[Battle of Yavin]] and [[Hijacking of the Harbinger|hijacked]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]].
*'''''[[Harbinger (Third Fleet)|Harbinger]]''''', an Imperial [[Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Third Fleet]] under [[Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon]].
*'''''[[Harbinger (Tector-class)|Harbinger]]''''', a [[Tector-class|''Tector''-class]] used by the Galactic Empire at the [[Battle of Endor]].
*'''''[[Harbinger (Resurgent-class)|Harbinger]]''''', a [[Resurgent-class Star Destroyer|''Resurgent''-class Star Destroyer]] used by the [[First Order]].
*'''[[Harbinger courier ship]]''', a type of Imperial [[courier]] [[Starship|ship]] carried aboard the ''[[Strikefast]]''.

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''''[[Harbinger (Sith dreadnaught)|Harbinger]]''''', a [[Sith dreadnaught]] during the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]].
*'''''[[Harbinger (Hammerhead-class)|Harbinger]]''''', a [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]] commandeered by [[Darth Sion]] following the [[Jedi Civil War]].
*'''''[[Harbinger (landing ship)|Harbinger]]''''', a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] landing ship.
*'''[[Harbinger courier ship/Legends|Harbinger courier ship]]''', a model of [[Courier/Legends|courier]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
*'''''[[Harbinger (assault ship)|Harbinger]]''''', an [[Assault ship/Legends|assault ship]] piloted by [[Bel Att]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
*'''''[[Harbinger (Mon Calamari Star Cruiser)|Harbinger]]''''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]].
*'''''[[Harbinger (Imperial II-class)|Harbinger]]''''', an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] used by the [[Imperial Remnant]].
*The '''[[Harbinger (speeder bike)|Harbinger]]''', a model of [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]]

==Real-world==
*"'''[[The Harbinger]]'''", the ninth episode of ''[[Star Wars: The Bad Batch]]''{{'s}} [[The Bad Batch Season 3|third season]]
